---
title: "GO Enrichment Diverging Plot"
author: "Elizabeth McHale"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE, 
                      fig.width = 10, fig.height = 8, dpi = 300)
```

## Load Required Libraries

```{r libraries}
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
library(scales)  # for pretty axis labels

# Set theme for publication-quality plots
theme_set(theme_minimal(base_size = 12))
```

## Prepare Data

```{r data}
# Create the GO enrichment data
# Based on your manuscript text

go_data <- tribble(
  ~GO_term,                                          ~category,        ~gene_count, ~total_genes, ~FDR,
  # Temperature-associated terms
  "response to hormone",                             "Temperature",    12,          439,          0.009,
  "response to chemical stimulus",                   "Temperature",    14,          557,          0.009,
  "response to endogenous stimulus",                 "Temperature",    12,          439,          0.009,
  "cell recognition",                                "Temperature",    13,          562,          0.011,
  "response to abscisic acid",                       "Temperature",    3,           42,           0.018,
  "abscisic acid-activated signaling pathway",       "Temperature",    3,           42,           0.018,
  "hormone-mediated signaling pathway",              "Temperature",    4,           84,           0.018,
  "cell wall modification",                          "Temperature",    5,           118,          0.018,
  "recognition of pollen",                           "Temperature",    13,          562,          0.011,
  
  # Precipitation-associated terms
  "chromatin remodeling",                            "Precipitation",  5,           97,           0.011,
  "chromatin organization",                          "Precipitation",  5,           106,          0.011,
  "nucleosome assembly",                             "Precipitation",  4,           67,           0.011,
  "nucleosome organization",                         "Precipitation",  4,           67,           0.011,
  "protein-DNA complex assembly",                    "Precipitation",  4,           104,          0.023,
  "protein-DNA complex organization",                "Precipitation",  4,           104,          0.023,
  "adenylate cyclase-modulating GPCR signaling",     "Precipitation",  2,           11,           0.022,
  
  # Shared terms - add to both categories
  "response to lipid",                               "Temperature",    NA,          NA,           0.05,  # adjust FDR
  "response to lipid",                               "Precipitation",  NA,          NA,           0.05,
  "cellular response to lipid",                      "Temperature",    NA,          NA,           0.05,
  "cellular response to lipid",                      "Precipitation",  NA,          NA,           0.05,
  "cellular response to oxygen-containing compound", "Temperature",    NA,          NA,           0.05,
  "cellular response to oxygen-containing compound", "Precipitation",  NA,          NA,           0.05
) %>%
  mutate(
    log10FDR = -log10(FDR),
    # Calculate gene ratio (enrichment)
    gene_ratio = gene_count / total_genes,
    # Mark shared terms
    is_shared = GO_term %in% c("response to lipid", 
                                "cellular response to lipid",
                                "cellular response to oxygen-containing compound")
  )

# Check data
print(go_data)
```

## Create Diverging Plot

```{r diverging_plot, fig.width=12, fig.height=8}
# Prepare data for diverging plot
plot_data <- go_data %>%
  mutate(
    # Make temperature terms negative for left side
    x_position = ifelse(category == "Temperature", -log10FDR, log10FDR),
    # Create nicer category labels
    plot_category = case_when(
      is_shared ~ "Shared",
      category == "Temperature" ~ "Temperature",
      category == "Precipitation" ~ "Precipitation"
    ),
    # Shorten long GO terms for better display
    GO_term_short = case_when(
      GO_term == "cellular response to oxygen-containing compound" ~ 
        "cellular response to oxygen-containing cpd",
      GO_term == "adenylate cyclase-modulating GPCR signaling" ~ 
        "adenylate cyclase-modulating GPCR",
      GO_term == "abscisic acid-activated signaling pathway" ~ 
        "ABA-activated signaling pathway",
      TRUE ~ GO_term
    ),
    # Add gene counts to labels
    label = ifelse(!is.na(gene_count), 
                   paste0(GO_term_short, " (n=", gene_count, ")"),
                   GO_term_short)
  ) %>%
  # Sort by significance within each category
  arrange(category, desc(abs(log10FDR))) %>%
  # Create ordered factor for y-axis
  mutate(label = factor(label, levels = unique(label)))

# Create the plot
p <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = x_position, y = label)) +
  # Add vertical line at x=0
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50", size = 0.5) +
  
  # Add line segments (lollipop sticks)
  geom_segment(aes(x = x_position, xend = 0, y = label, yend = label, color = plot_category),
               size = 0.8, alpha = 0.6) +
  
  # Add points (lollipop heads)
  geom_point(aes(size = gene_count, color = plot_category, alpha = plot_category)) +
  
  # Color scheme
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("Temperature" = "#E69F00",  # orange
               "Precipitation" = "#0072B2",  # blue
               "Shared" = "#CC79A7"),  # purple/pink for shared
    name = NULL
  ) +
  
  # Alpha to make shared terms more subtle
  scale_alpha_manual(
    values = c("Temperature" = 1, "Precipitation" = 1, "Shared" = 0.6),
    guide = "none"
  ) +
  
  # Size scale for gene counts
  scale_size_continuous(
    range = c(3, 10),
    breaks = c(3, 5, 10, 14),
    name = "Gene Count"
  ) +
  
  # Axis labels
  labs(
    x = "-log10(FDR)",
    y = NULL,
    title = "Enriched Gene Ontology Terms",
    subtitle = "Temperature-Associated (left) vs Precipitation-Associated (right)"
  ) +
  
  # Customize x-axis to show absolute values
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = seq(-2.5, 2.5, 0.5),
    labels = abs(seq(-2.5, 2.5, 0.5)),
    limits = c(-2.5, 2.5)
  ) +
  
  # Theme adjustments
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "gray90", size = 0.3),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_line(color = "gray90", size = 0.3),
    axis.text.y = element_text(hjust = 1, size = 10),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "right",
    legend.title = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 10, hjust = 0.5, color = "gray40"),
    plot.margin = margin(10, 10, 10, 10)
  )

# Display plot
print(p)
```

## Alternative Version with Annotations

```{r diverging_annotated, fig.width=12, fig.height=8}
# Version with side labels
p2 <- p +
  # Add text annotations for Temperature and Precipitation
  annotate("text", x = -2.2, y = max(as.numeric(plot_data$label)) + 1, 
           label = "Temperature-Associated", 
           color = "#E69F00", size = 5, fontface = "bold", hjust = 0) +
  annotate("text", x = 2.2, y = max(as.numeric(plot_data$label)) + 1, 
           label = "Precipitation-Associated", 
           color = "#0072B2", size = 5, fontface = "bold", hjust = 1) +
  
  # Add arrows
  annotate("segment", x = -1.8, xend = -0.5, 
           y = max(as.numeric(plot_data$label)) + 0.5, 
           yend = max(as.numeric(plot_data$label)) + 0.5,
           arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.3, "cm")), 
           color = "#E69F00", size = 0.8) +
  annotate("segment", x = 1.8, xend = 0.5, 
           y = max(as.numeric(plot_data$label)) + 0.5, 
           yend = max(as.numeric(plot_data$label)) + 0.5,
           arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.3, "cm")), 
           color = "#0072B2", size = 0.8)

print(p2)
```

## Cleaner Version (Publication-Ready)

```{r publication_version, fig.width=11, fig.height=7}
# Most polished version
p3 <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = x_position, y = label)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "solid", color = "gray30", size = 0.3) +
  
  geom_segment(aes(x = x_position, xend = 0, y = label, yend = label, color = plot_category),
               size = 1, alpha = 0.7) +
  
  geom_point(aes(size = gene_count, color = plot_category, alpha = plot_category),
             shape = 19) +
  
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("Temperature" = "#D55E00",  # red-orange
               "Precipitation" = "#0072B2",  # blue
               "Shared" = "#999999"),  # gray for shared
    name = NULL
  ) +
  
  scale_alpha_manual(
    values = c("Temperature" = 1, "Precipitation" = 1, "Shared" = 0.5),
    guide = "none"
  ) +
  
  scale_size_continuous(
    range = c(2, 8),
    breaks = c(3, 5, 10, 14),
    name = "Gene\nCount"
  ) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = seq(-2, 2, 0.5),
    labels = abs(seq(-2, 2, 0.5)),
    limits = c(-2.3, 2.3)
  ) +
  
  labs(
    x = "-log₁₀(FDR)",
    y = NULL
  ) +
  
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11, base_family = "Arial") +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_line(color = "gray85", size = 0.25),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 9, color = "black"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10, color = "black"),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold", margin = margin(t = 10)),
    legend.position = c(0.85, 0.15),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = "gray80", size = 0.5),
    legend.key.size = unit(0.8, "lines"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 9),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 9, face = "bold"),
    plot.margin = margin(15, 15, 15, 15),
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "gray50", fill = NA, size = 0.5)
  )

print(p3)
```

## Save Publication Figure

```{r save_figure, eval=FALSE}
# Save as high-resolution PNG
ggsave("Figure7_GO_Enrichment_Diverging.png", 
       plot = p3, 
       width = 11, 
       height = 7, 
       dpi = 600,
       bg = "white")

# Save as PDF for journal submission
ggsave("Figure7_GO_Enrichment_Diverging.pdf", 
       plot = p3, 
       width = 11, 
       height = 7,
       device = cairo_pdf)

# Save as TIFF (some journals require this)
ggsave("Figure7_GO_Enrichment_Diverging.tiff", 
       plot = p3, 
       width = 11, 
       height = 7, 
       dpi = 600,
       compression = "lzw")
```

## Summary Statistics

```{r summary}
# Calculate summary stats for text
summary_stats <- plot_data %>%
  distinct(GO_term, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  group_by(plot_category) %>%
  summarise(
    n_terms = n(),
    mean_FDR = mean(FDR, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_genes = mean(gene_count, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

print("Summary by Category:")
print(summary_stats)

# Shared terms
shared_terms <- plot_data %>%
  filter(is_shared) %>%
  distinct(GO_term) %>%
  pull(GO_term)

print(paste("Number of shared terms:", length(shared_terms)))
print("Shared terms:")
print(shared_terms)
```

## Session Info

```{r session}
sessionInfo()
```
